description: Data2CRM is a unified CRM integration service from MagneticOne/SyncMatters that lets software connect to multiple CRM platforms through a common API. Its site positions it as a platform for CRM integrations and data synchronization/migration across supported CRMs.
summary: Data2CRM exposes one documented REST API surface, Data2CRM.API, a unified CRM HTTP API authenticated with a user key and, for many entity/application operations, an application key sent in headers.
